jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Cuemath
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Cuemath in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cuemath:
Cuemath is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath!
